description: The Mazzaferro are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Marina di Gioiosa Jonica, Italy. They are active in the homonymous Locale alongside the Aquino family, with whom they have been in conflict since the 1970s. They are involved in drug and arms trafficking, extortion, and have expanded into northern Italy and abroad, including Germany, Belgium, and the United Kingdom.

country_links.evidence_quote: Hanno ramificazioni al nord e all'estero come in Germania (dagli anni '80 a Stoccarda e Mannheim ), Belgio e Regno Unito .
country_links.context: The 'Ndrina Mazzaferro has branches in Belgium.

country_links.evidence_quote: il 30% della cocaina importata dalla Colombia dai Caruana era destinata ai Mazzaferro
country_links.context: The 'Ndrina Mazzaferro received 30% of cocaine imported from Colombia by the Caruana clan.

country_links.evidence_quote: Hanno ramificazioni al nord e all'estero come in Germania (dagli anni '80 a Stoccarda e Mannheim )
country_links.context: The 'Ndrina Mazzaferro has had branches in Germany since the 1980s, specifically in Stuttgart and Mannheim.

country_links.evidence_quote: Hanno ramificazioni al nord e all'estero come in Germania (dagli anni '80 a Stoccarda e Mannheim ), Belgio e Regno Unito .
country_links.context: The 'Ndrina Mazzaferro has branches in the United Kingdom.
